title: Heart recype Addon for Livesteal datapack by faker
description: Adds a recype for Livesteal Hearts
body:
## Features
 - Adds a new way to gain Hearts like on the [Livesteal SMP](https://lifesteal.fandom.com/wiki/Lifesteal_SMP_Wiki)
## How to get Livesteal by faker
Go to [this](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lifesteal-datapack) link and instal the datapack
than you can instal this datapack.
## How to craft hearts
 1. Obtain folowing items
> - 4 Netherite Blocks
> - 4 Totems of undying
> - 1 Nether Star 


  
ㅤ 2. Put them in a crafting grid like in 
the immage
 ![Crafting recype](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d6948f1f87df56a7a0034b3f4a36c78d767f564.png)
 Congratulations youve succesvuly crafted a heart!
